title: Neudorff Super Strength Cat Repellent – Ready-to-use Repellent Effectively Repels Cats Without harming Them - Covers 200 m², 500 g
features: Effective cat deterrent: A natural repellent that repels cats without causing them harm and is effective for use in backyards, terraces, and places where birds are regularly found. Covers 200 m²

Long term effect: The long lasting odour drives cats away without causing them any harm. This prevents cats from effectively 'marking' their territory and therefore cats will avoid the area in the future
Easy to use: First remove markings like urine and feces. The ready-to-use granules are easy to spread over favourite cat habitats such as wall and roof ledges
Particularly suitable for outdoor areas: Due to the intense odour of the repellent granules, we recommend using Cat Repellent only outdoors
Natural cat scarers: The cat repeller utilises food grade garlic oil bound in clay based mineral granules to provide a natural and effective remedy against troublesome cats
description: From the manufacturer Neudorff 500g Super Strength Cat Repellent Deters cats from fouling in the garden A natural repellent which masks the territorial markings left by cats. This prevents cats from effectively 'marking' their territory and cats therefore avoid the area in the future. Contains natural plant extracts The product utilises food grade garlic oil bound in clay based mineral granules to provide a natural and effective remedy against troublesome cats. Covers 200m2 The long last odour from Super Strength Cat Repellent drives cats away without causing them any harm and is effective for use in backyards, terraces as well as places where birds are regularly found. Precautions Wear suitable protective gloves Avoid contact with skin Keep out of reach of children Instructions for use Treat the area to be protected with approximately 5g of product per 2 sqm. Use is recommended in areas that cats frequently trespass. Protection lasts for 1-2 weeks depending on weather. Use is recommended for outdoor only, as it has a strong odour
